arts.ttl: Brighton transfer news: £7m target shares "plan" to move abroad after 'disappointing' January collapse
arts.sum: Brondby starlet Clement Bischoff expresses his disappointment following the collapse of his January transfer to Brighton and hopes he can move abroad in the near future.

arts.ttl: Is there VAR and extra time in Newcastle United vs Brighton? FA Cup fifth round rules explained
arts.sum: Yes, the fifth round of the competition will see the introduction of VAR after the technology was not in use for previous rounds. It has been confirmed that as well as VAR, the fifth round will see the introduction of semi-automated offsides.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer Shares Big Newcastle and Isak Update Ahead of Carabao Cup Final
arts.sum: Newcastle United legend Alan Shearer has dropped a promising update on club striker Alexander Isak ahead of their Carabao Cup final.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United fixture selected for new FA trial ahead of key decision
arts.sum: It was confirmed following the fourth round that the next set of game would see the introduction of semi-automated offsides, aswell as the use of VAR. Newcastle United’s FA Cup fifth round against Brighton and Hove Albion will be one of the games that will see the implementation of semi-automatic offsides in English football for the first time.

arts.ttl: Newcastle transfer news: Three summer signings 'lined up' including 'verbal agreement' for £30m top target
arts.sum: Newcastle United have already lined up three new signings for the summer transfer window, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Brighton man delighted with transfer choice – Rubbishes transfer claim, one big issue at loan club
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion midfielder Julio Enciso has insisted he didn’t have the option to join Borussia Dortmund in the January transfer window and wanted to remain in the Premier League. Versus have an interview with the midfielder today in which he discusses various topics, including his move to Ipswich last month. The Brighton man The post Brighton man delighted with transfer choice – Rubbishes transfer claim, one big issue at loan club appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: “One of the best” – Brighton man confident signing will shine, didn’t miss impressive debut
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion midfielder Julio Enciso has admitted he is very happy to have compatriot Diego Gomez alongside him at the club. Versus have an interview with Enciso today in which he’s asked about his fellow Paraguay international. Gomez arrived at Brighton in a €13m move from Inter Miami in the January transfer window The post “One of the best” – Brighton man confident signing will shine, didn’t miss impressive debut appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool 'Very Likely' to be in Mix to Sign Alexander Isak
arts.sum: Liverpool are poised to be in the mix to complete the acquisition of Newcastle United frontman Alexander Isak in the summer

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs. Brighton: Why Eddie Howe can rely on William Osula with impressive FA Cup record amid Alexander Isak injury doubt
arts.sum: Newcastle boss Eddie Howe can put his faith in striker William Osula - who boasts an impressive FA Cup record - in Sunday's fifth-round clash with Brighton if Alexander Isak is not fit to feature.

arts.ttl: Martin Dubravka discovers Newcastle United recall fate after defensive inquest
arts.sum: When asked his views on Pope's performances, Howe said: "I think with Nick, there's been some good bits and there's been some bits that probably naturally when you're coming back from injury, like he has been, that have been a little bit rusty in his game. Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe is pondering another goalkeeping change this Sunday as Brighton & Hove Albion come to St James' Park on FA Cup fifth round weekend.
